ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] (Bible) Go to the [Bible Hub Complete Biblical Timeline](https://biblehub.com/timeline/) to find dates to put in your Book of Centuries.
[ ] (Old Testament) Listen to [Psalms](https://thepsalmsproject.com/music) set to music, or create your own music to accompany one of the Psalms you read this term. (You could use piano, rhythm sticks, tambourine, drum, etc.)
[ ] (New Testament) Watch Luke's Dispatches, which begin in the book of Acts but tell about the spread of the gospel in our present-day world. You can sign up for a free account.

[ ] (Bible) Explore the virtual resources at the [Museum of the Bible](https://www.museumofthebible.org/museum-from-home). (Note: a teacher should preview.)
[ ] (Old Testament) Write a favorite Psalm on watercolor paper and then decorate the border with simple brush drawings. You can frame the finished art to hang in your home or give it as a gift.

[ ] (Bible) This [website](https://www.opendoorsuk.org/persecution/world-watch-list/) lists the countries where Christians are still persecuted today and how we can pray for them.
[ ] (Bible) Share a meal with others such as taking donations to a food bank, taking a meal to a neighbor, or baking cookies for a local fire or police station.
[ ] (New Testament) Create a "[Resurrection Garden](https://seedskidsworship.com/resurrection-garden/)." (These can also be used as centerpieces for Easter dinner.)
[ ] (New Testament) Watch [Luke's Dispatches](https://frontlinemissions.info/store/p/lukes-dispatches-1-3) which begin in the book of Acts but tell about the spread of the gospel in our present-day world. You can sign up for a free account.

resources.title: Be Thou My Vision: A Liturgy for Daily Worship
resources.author: Jonathan Gibson
resources.rationale:
➜ May sub Book of Common Prayer OR Phyllis Tickle's series: The Divine Hours
Helpful for establishing daily practices of reading and prayer.

resources.title: David's Crown: Sounding the Psalms
resources.author: Malcolm Guite
resources.rationale: ➜ The poetical responses to each Psalm by the author.

resources.title: Divine Hours: Prayers for Summertime
resources.author: Phyllis Tickle
resources.rationale:
➜ May sub Book of Common Prayer OR Be Thou My Vision
A contemporary collection of prayers, psalms, and readings.

resources.title: ESV Illuminated Scripture Journals (New Testament)
resources.author: Crossway
resources.rationale: Personal Study: May sub ESV Scripture Journal or any other journal. Purchase journals to correspond with NT readings.

resources.title: Habits of Grace
resources.author: David Mathis
resources.rationale: Personal Study: Basic encouragement in the spiritual disciplines of prayer, reading the Bible, and fellowship.

resources.title: Habits of Grace Study Guide
resources.author: David Mathis
resources.rationale: Personal Study: Useful for establishing the habits of prayer, Bible reading, and fellowship.

resources.title: Reading the Bible Supernaturally
resources.author: John Piper
resources.rationale: Personal Study: To help us see more of God as we read the Bible.

resources.title: The Book of Common Prayer
resources.rationale:
➜ May sub Phyllis Tickle's series: The Divine Hours OR Be Thou My Vision
Collection of prayers, psalms, and readings used in the church for several centuries.

resources.title: The Divine Hours, Volume II: Prayers for Autumn and Wintertime (Divine Hours)
resources.author: Phyllis Tickle
resources.rationale: ➜ May sub Book of Common Prayer OR Be Thou My Vision A contemporary collection of prayers, psalms, and readings.
